markdownRemark.html:
Python for Scientific Audio

The aim of this repository is to create a comprehensive, curated list of python software/tools related and used for scientific research in audio/music applications.

Contents

  • Audio Related Packages
    • Read/Write
    • Transformations - General DSP
    • Feature extraction
    • Data augmentation
    • Speech Processing
    • Environmental Sounds
    • Perceptial Models - Auditory Models
    • Source Separation
    • Music Information Retrieval
    • Deep Learning
    • Symbolic Music - MIDI - Musicology
    • Realtime applications
    • Web - Audio
    • Audio related APIs and Datasets
    • Wrappers for Audio Plugins
  • Tutorials
  • Books
  • Scientific Paper
  • Other Resources
  • Related lists
  • Contributing
  • License

Audio Related Packages

  • Total number of packages: 66

Read-Write

  • audiolazystars582 stars582 - Expressive Digital Signal Processing (DSP) package for Python.
  • audioreadstars362 stars362 - Cross-library (GStreamer + Core Audio + MAD + FFmpeg) audio decoding.
  • mutagen stars776 - Reads and writes all kind of audio metadata for various formats.
  • pyAV stars1.2k - PyAV is a Pythonic binding for FFmpeg or Libav.
  • (Py)Soundfile stars6 - Library based on libsndfile, CFFI, and NumPy.
  • pySoxstars357 stars357 - Wrapper for sox.
  • stempegstars53 stars53 - read/write of STEMS multistream audio.
  • tinytagstars454 stars454 - reading music meta data of MP3, OGG, FLAC and Wave files.

Transformations - General DSP

  • acoustics stars312 - useful tools for acousticians.
  • AudioTKstars225 stars225 - DSP filter toolbox (lots of filters).
  • AudioTSM stars61 - real-time audio time-scale modification procedures.
  • Gammatonestars152 stars152 - Gammatone filterbank implementation.
  • pyFFTW stars259 - Wrapper for FFTW(3).
  • NSGT stars73 - Non-stationary gabor transform, constant-q.
  • matcheringstars412 stars412 - Automated reference audio mastering.
  • MDCTstars32 stars32 - MDCT transform.
  • pydub stars5.3k - Manipulate audio with a simple and easy high level interface.
  • pytftb stars186 - Implementation of the MATLAB Time-Frequency Toolbox.
  • pyroomacousticsstars692 stars692 - Room Acoustics Simulation (RIR generator)
  • PyRubberbandstars61 stars61 - Wrapper for rubberband to do pitch-shifting and time-stretching.
  • PyWavelets stars1.1k - Discrete Wavelet Transform in Python.
  • Resampy stars158 - Sample rate conversion.
  • SFS-Python stars45 - Sound Field Synthesis Toolbox.
  • sound_field_analysis stars46 - Analyze, visualize and process sound field data recorded by spherical microphone arrays.
  • STFT stars36 - Standalone package for Short-Time Fourier Transform.

Feature extraction

  • aubio stars2.1k - Feature extractor, written in C, Python interface.
  • audiolazystars582 stars582 - Realtime Audio Processing lib, general purpose.
  • essentia stars1.8k - Music related low level and high level feature extractor, C++ based, includes Python bindings.
  • python_speech_featuresstars1.9k stars1.9k - Common speech features for ASR.
  • pyYAAFEstars191 stars191 - Python bindings for YAAFE feature extractor.
  • speechpystars837 stars837 - Library for Speech Processing and Recognition, mostly feature extraction for now.
  • spafestars128 stars128 - Python library for features extraction from audio files.

Data augmentation

  • audiomentationsstars509 stars509 - Audio Data Augmentation.
  • muda stars182 - Musical Data Augmentation.
  • pydiogmentstars46 stars46 - Audio Data Augmentation.

Speech Processing

  • aeneas stars1.9k - Forced aligner, based on MFCC+DTW, 35+ languages.
  • deepspeechstars17.3k stars17.3k - Pretrained automatic speech recognition.
  • gentlestars936 stars936 - Forced-aligner built on Kaldi.
  • Parselmouthstars507 stars507 - Python interface to the Praat phonetics and speech analysis, synthesis, and manipulation software.
  • persephone stars131 - Automatic phoneme transcription tool.
  • pyannote.audiostars1k stars1k - Neural building blocks for speaker diarization.
  • pyAudioAnalysisstars3.9k² stars3.9k - Feature Extraction, Classification, Diarization.
  • py-webrtcvadstars1.1k stars1.1k - Interface to the WebRTC Voice Activity Detector.
  • pypesqstars195 stars195 - Wrapper for the PESQ score calculation.
  • pystoistars169 stars169 - Short Term Objective Intelligibility measure (STOI).
  • PyWorldVocoderstars435 stars435 - Wrapper for Morise's World Vocoder.
  • Montreal Forced Aligner stars532 - Forced aligner, based on Kaldi (HMM), English (others can be trained).
  • SIDEKIT - Speaker and Language recognition.
  • SpeechRecognitionstars5.6k stars5.6k - Wrapper for several ASR engines and APIs, online and offline.

Environmental Sounds

  • sed_eval stars88 - Evaluation toolbox for Sound Event Detection

Perceptial Models - Auditory Models

  • cochleastars83 stars83 - Inner ear models.
  • Brian2 stars548 - Spiking neural networks simulator, includes cochlea model.
  • Loudnessstars29 stars29 - Perceived loudness, includes Zwicker, Moore/Glasberg model.
  • pyloudnorm stars187 - Audio loudness meter and normalization, implements ITU-R BS.1770-4.
  • Sound Field Synthesis Toolbox stars45 - Sound Field Synthesis Toolbox.

Source Separation

  • commonfatestars17 stars17 - Common Fate Model and Transform.
  • NTFLibstars44 stars44 - Sparse Beta-Divergence Tensor Factorization.
  • NUSSL stars391 - Holistic source separation framework including DSP methods and deep learning methods.
  • NIMFA stars449 - Several flavors of non-negative-matrix factorization.

Music Information Retrieval

  • Catchystars15 stars15 - Corpus Analysis Tools for Computational Hook Discovery.
  • Madmom stars739 - MIR packages with strong focus on beat detection, onset detection and chord recognition.
  • mir_eval stars361 - Common scores for various MIR tasks. Also includes bss_eval implementation.
  • msaf stars308 - Music Structure Analysis Framework.
  • librosa stars4.5k - General audio and music analysis.

Deep Learning

  • Kaprestars738 stars738 - Keras Audio Preprocessors
  • TorchAudiostars1.3k stars1.3k - PyTorch Audio Loaders
  • nnAudiostars465 stars465 - Accelerated audio processing using 1D convolution networks in PyTorch.

Symbolic Music - MIDI - Musicology

  • Music21 stars1.3k - Toolkit for Computer-Aided Musicology.
  • Mido stars804 - Realtime MIDI wrapper.
  • mingusstars583 stars583 - Advanced music theory and notation package with MIDI file and playback support.
  • Pretty-MIDI stars496 - Utility functions for handling MIDI data in a nice/intuitive way.

Realtime applications

  • Jupyletstars127 stars127 - Subtractive, additive, FM, and sample-based sound synthesis.
  • PYO stars933 - Realtime audio dsp engine.
  • python-sounddevicestars533 - PortAudio wrapper providing realtime audio I/O with NumPy.
  • ReTiSARstars34 stars34 - Binarual rendering of streamed or IR-based high-order spherical microphone array signals.

Web Audio

  • TimeSide (Beta) - high level audio analysis, imaging, transcoding, streaming and labelling.

Audio Dataset and Dataloaders

  • beets stars10.1k - Music library manager and MusicBrainz tagger.
  • musdb stars90 - Parse and process the MUSDB18 dataset.
  • medleydb stars116 - Parse medleydb audio + annotations.
  • Soundcloud APIstars62 stars62 - Wrapper for Soundcloud API.
  • Youtube-Downloader stars94.5k - Download youtube videos (and the audio).
  • audiomatestars99 stars99 - Loading different types of audio datasets.
  • mirdata stars177 - Common loaders for Music Information Retrieval (MIR) datasets.

Wrappers for Audio Plugins

  • VamPy Host - Interface compiled vamp plugins.

Tutorials

  • Whirlwind Tour Of Python [](https://github.com/jakevdp/WhirlwindTourOfPythonstars2.8k

) - fast-paced introduction to Python essentials, aimed at researchers and developers.

  • Introduction to Numpy and Scipy stars2.7k - Highly recommended tutorial, covers large parts of the scientific Python ecosystem.
  • Numpy for MATLAB® Users - Short overview of equivalent python functions for switchers.
  • MIR Notebooks stars853 - collection of instructional iPython Notebooks for music information retrieval (MIR).
  • Selected Topics in Audio Signal Processingstars49 - Exercises as iPython notebooks.
  • Live-coding a music synthesizer Live-coding video showing how to use the SoundDevice library to reproduce realistic sounds. Codestars15.

Books

  • Python Data Science Handbookstars29.1k - Jake Vanderplas, Excellent Book and accompanying tutorial notebooks.
  • Fundamentals of Music Processing - Meinard Müller, comes with Python exercises.

Scientific Papers

  • Python for audio signal processing - John C. Glover, Victor Lazzarini and Joseph Timoney, Linux Audio Conference 2011.
  • librosa: Audio and Music Signal Analysis in Python, Video - Brian McFee, Colin Raffel, Dawen Liang, Daniel P.W. Ellis, Matt McVicar, Eric Battenberg, Oriol Nieto, Scipy 2015.
  • pyannote.audio: neural building blocks for speaker diarization, Video - Hervé Bredin, Ruiqing Yin, Juan Manuel Coria, Gregory Gelly, Pavel Korshunov, Marvin Lavechin, Diego Fustes, Hadrien Titeux, Wassim Bouaziz, Marie-Philippe Gill, ICASSP 2020.

Other Resources

  • Coursera Course - Audio Signal Processing, Python based course from UPF of Barcelona and Stanford University.
  • Digital Signal Processing Course - Masters Course Material (University of Rostock) with many Python examples.
  • Slack Channel - Music Information Retrieval Community.

Related lists

There is already PythonInMusic but it is not up to date and includes too many packages of special interest that are mostly not relevant for scientific applications. Awesome-Pythonstars100k is large curated list of python packages. However, the audio section is very small.

Contributing

Your contributions are always welcome! Please take a look at the contribution guidelines first.

I will keep some pull requests open if I'm not sure whether those libraries are awesome, you could vote for them by adding 👍 to them.

License
